name: Shorts Batch
description: Batch-generate multiple short videos in one job AND host the project's 6-stage video-pipeline orchestrator (Phase 3). Each brief is expanded into a 4-12 shot scene plan, scored with the slideshow_risk heuristic (D2.1), and either rendered through a pluggable downstream renderer (legacy: seedance-video / ppt-to-video) or driven through the full plan→image→video→audio→subtitle→mux pipeline.

description_i18n.zh: 一次性批量生成多个短视频。每条 brief 先扩成 4-12 个分镜，过 slideshow_risk 启发式打分（D2.1），再交给可插拔的下游渲染器（默认：占位渲染；生产：seedance-video / ppt-to-video）。
description_i18n.en: Batch-generate multiple short videos in one job. Each brief is expanded into a 4-12 shot scene plan, scored with the slideshow_risk heuristic (D2.1), and rendered through a pluggable downstream renderer (default: stub; production: seedance-video / ppt-to-video).

author: OpenAkita
